images.caption:
(a)System integration. The action agent (left) interacts with the
environment; the memory agent (right) runs alongside, observing a sliding
window of recent steps and the current memory store. At everyNNsteps the
memory agent is invoked to update the bank and optionally inject a context
reminder into the next action-agent call.

(a)System integration. The action agent (left) interacts with the
environment; the memory agent (right) runs alongside, observing a sliding
window of recent steps and the current memory store. At everyNNsteps the
memory agent is invoked to update the bank and optionally inject a context
reminder into the next action-agent call.

(b)Memory agent internals. Phase 1 manages the memory bank
(status,knowledge,proceduralentries) through tool
calls. Phase 2 reads the updated bank and either emits a<context_for_action>reminder or<no_intervention/>.
